reasoning_chain_text: 1. Determine the vocal or musical roles described for Chad Gray and Dickie Peterson.
2. Compare those roles and return whether both were singers.
original_final_question: Were Chad Gray and Dickie Peterson both singers? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Compare the supported evidence: Node 1: Chad Gray: Chad Gray (born October 16, 1971), is the lead vocalist for the groove metal supergroup Hellyeah and former lead vocalist for American heavy metal band Mudvayne.; Node 2: Dickie Peterson: Richard Allan Peterson (September 12, 1946 – October 12, 2009) was an American musician, best known as the bassist and lead singer for Blue Cheer..
